evals.prompt:
Fetch this design file, read its readme, and implement the relevant aspects of the design. https://api.anthropic.com/v1/design/h/NsZMy55O52YG5VV49pPgIQ?open_file=ui_kits%2Fzero%2Findex.html
Implement: ui_kits/zero/index.html
evals.expected_output: Agent parses URL, fetches archive, reads README before target file, maps colors to zero-ui theme tokens, does not write Compose code before fetching

evals.prompt: Can you check this design and tell me what layout/colors I need for the new screen? https://api.anthropic.com/v1/design/h/NsZMy55O52YG5VV49pPgIQ?open_file=ui_kits%2Fzero%2Findex.html
evals.expected_output: Agent recognises the URL as a Claude Design URL, fetches it, reads README, extracts layout and color information rather than guessing from prose

evals.prompt: I want to add a new budget overview screen to the app. It should have a card at the top with total budget and a scrollable list of categories below. Can you implement it?
evals.expected_output: Skill should NOT trigger — no Claude Design URL present. Agent asks for a design file or proceeds without the fetch-design workflow.
